title: Rich Smoky Brazilian Cheese Lasagna
description: A smoky, cheese-pull, energizing Brazilian dish featuring cinnamon and render-fat, this lasagna is perfect for a special occasion. It is also shojin-friendly, making it accessible to a variety of diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the rendered fat over medium heat.
Add the smoked mozzarella cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Add the parmesan cheese, cinnamon, and nutritional yeast, if using, and stir to combine.
Spread a layer of tomato sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the cheese mixture over the noodles.
Repeat the layers, starting with the sauce, then the noodles, and finally the remaining cheese mixture.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
